code: import React,{useState}from'react';import login from'../../api/login.api';import'../../reusable.css';import'./Login.css';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Login=()=>{const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[serverError,setServerError]=useState(null);const[email,setEmail]=useState('');const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const auth=()=>{setServerError(null);if(email===''||password===''){setServerError('Email and Password is required!');}else{const userData={email,password};login(userData,setServerError,setLoading);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"login d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[serverError?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:serverError}):'',/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",placeholder:"Email",onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"password",onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"button",onClick:auth,children:loading?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"button-loader"}):'Login'})]})});};export default Login;
